# Luka Engels

> Software Development Team Lead with 20+ years of experience in scalable cloud systems, TypeScript microservices on AWS, and applied Large Language Models.

Luka Engels is an engineering leader based in Hamburg, Germany, currently serving as Lead Software Engineer at Empro / AVIV Group. His core focus is production TypeScript microservices on AWS, distributed system architecture, and integrating Large Language Models into real-world products.

He combines hands-on development with technical leadership of distributed teams, drawing on prior senior roles at immowelt GmbH, neveling.net, Spencer Stuart Dublin, and Erste Group Bank. Primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, Angular, AWS (with CDK), Elasticsearch, and Docker. Practices include Agile/Scrum, TDD, DDD, microservices, onion architecture, and event-driven design.

Languages: English (fluent), German (professional), Italian (advanced), Croatian (native). The site is a single-page portfolio with downloadable A4 CVs in English and German.

## Portfolio
- [Personal site](https://luka-engels.de/): single-page portfolio with About, Experience, Skills, Education, Projects, and Contact sections.

## CV
- [CV (English, A4 HTML)](https://luka-engels.de/cv-luka-engels-en.html): print-ready résumé.
- [Lebenslauf (Deutsch, A4 HTML)](https://luka-engels.de/cv-luka-engels-de.html): druckfertiger Lebenslauf.

## Profiles
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/lukaengels/): professional profile and full work history.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/srnux): public code and project repositories.

## Optional
- [Contact email](mailto:luka.engels@outlook.de): direct contact for inquiries.
